title: Private equity firm EQT partners with Google Cloud for AI rollout
full_text: NEW YORK, May 28 (Reuters) - EQT (EQTAB.ST) has partnered with Alphabet's (GOOGL.O) Google Cloud to help more than 300 companies in the ​Swedish private equity firm's portfolio accelerate the adoption of ‌AI, the companies said on Thursday.
